title: helianthemum × sulphureum f. cupreum
intro: Helianthemum × sulphureum f. cupreum, also known as Rockrose, is a flowering plant species that is a hybrid of Helianthemum nummularium and possibly Helianthemum melinonii, resulting in a unique and attractive plant with copper-colored flowers. The medicinal properties of Rockrose include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rockrose include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for overall well-being. Rockrose can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for a range of applications and uses.
